planet.name: Jupiter
planet.description: The gas giant king of the solar system. A swirling world of clouds and storms, home to a complex moon system.

moons.name: Io
moons.description: The most volcanically active body in the solar system. Constantly reshaped by internal heating.

moons.name: Europa
moons.description: An icy moon hiding a vast subsurface ocean. Prime candidate for extraterrestrial life.

moons.name: Ganymede
moons.description: The largest moon in the solar system. Larger than the planet Mercury.

moons.name: Callisto
moons.description: Heavily cratered ancient moon. Possibly harboring subsurface water.

stations.name: Io Research Station
stations.description: Orbital platform studying Io's volcanic activity from safe distance.

stations.name: Europa Colony
stations.description: Research colony on Europa's icy surface. Gateway to the subsurface ocean.
